assertions.title: Multiple plans per user

steps.expected: Landing page loads with hero and CTA
steps.observed: Landing page loaded successfully with 'Get Started' CTA

steps.expected: Account created and redirected to dashboard
New plan page loads with chat interface
steps.observed: Plan creation page loaded with chat input and welcome message

steps.action: Send plan request: 'I'm at Santa Monica College transferring to UCLA for Computer Science'
steps.expected: AI generates plan with semester grid
steps.observed: Rate limit error: 'Rate limited, try again in a moment' - API returned 429

steps.expected: AI generates plan with semester grid
steps.observed: Still rate limited after 15 second wait

steps.expected: AI generates plan with semester grid
steps.observed: Still rate limited after 30 second wait - OpenRouter free tier quota exceeded

assertions.issues: Cannot test multiple plan creation because OpenRouter API rate limit prevents generating the first plan. The free tier allows 20 requests per minute and 50 requests per day, and this appears to be exhausted.

assertions.title: Multiple plans management

steps.expected: Plan A generates and saves to database
steps.observed: Blocked: Cannot generate Plan A due to OpenRouter rate limit

steps.expected: Plan B generates and saves independently
steps.observed: Blocked: Cannot proceed without Plan A

steps.expected: Dashboard shows both plans with correct metadata

steps.action: Open each plan and verify data
steps.expected: Each plan loads with correct data

evidence.network: N/A - blocked before API calls for plan persistence

assertions.issues: Same blocker as VAL-PLAN-007 - cannot create any plans due to OpenRouter rate limit.

frictions.description: OpenRouter free tier rate limit (20 req/min, 50 req/day) is very restrictive for testing. The application shows a clear error message 'Rate limited, try again in a moment' but the cooldown period seems longer than expected.
Chat input loses content after rate limit error - the message 'I'm at Santa Monica College transferring to UCLA for Computer Science' had to be retyped after each rate limit dismissal.

blockers.description: OpenRouter API rate limit (429) - Free tier quota appears exhausted. Cannot generate any AI plans for testing. Error shown: 'Rate limited, try again in a moment'. Waited 45 seconds total across multiple attempts but limit persisted.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried after 15s and 30s waits, still rate limited. OpenRouter free tier has 20 req/min and 50 req/day limits.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 2 blocked. Both assertions blocked by OpenRouter rate limit preventing plan generation. Successfully created test user and verified auth flow, but cannot test multiple plan creation/management without AI plan generation. Recent commit 754d84c (fix for second plan auto-save) could not be verified due to this blocker.
